hero.title: Build your perfect team
hero.subtitle: Generate optimal Marvel Rivals lineups based on synergies, tiers, counter-picks and the current meta.

select.title: Select Your Heroes
select.desc: Mark heroes you want to play with and enemies you're facing.

roles.title: Choose Roles
roles.desc: Specify how many Supports, Damage, and Tanks you need.

params.title: Set Parameters
params.desc: Enable synergies, tiers, counter-picks, and class weights.

generate.title: Generate Team
generate.desc: Get AI-powered recommendations with detailed scoring.

tools.title: Team building tools
tools.subtitle: Pick the mode that fits your party size.
tools.quick_pick_desc: Fast team builder with smart recommendations based on synergies, tiers, and counter-picks.
tools.duo_desc: Build powerful duos focusing on hero bonds and synergies between pairs.
tools.trio_desc: Balanced 3-hero teams with optimal role distribution and team bonuses.
tools.quadro_desc: Expanded 4-player parties with advanced role selection and counter-picks.
tools.full_team_desc: Complete 6-hero lineups based on player preferences, tiers, and classes.
tools.team_ups_desc: Theoretically strongest team compositions based on current meta and hero strength.
tools.data_base_desc: Browse all heroes, their roles, classes, tiers, and detailed statistics.

ai.title: AI-Powered
ai.desc: Smart algorithms analyze thousands of combinations to find the best team for your needs.

meta.title: Meta-Aware
meta.desc: Stay competitive with up-to-date tier lists, hero strengths, and current meta strategies.

custom.title: Fully Customizable
custom.desc: Fine-tune every aspect: synergies, counter-picks, class weights, and role distributions.

cta.title: Ready to build your dream team?
cta.subtitle: Free, fast, and updated with the current meta.

db.title: Meta Rivals: Database
db.tooltip_grade: Hover over the Grade badge to see synergy details.

qp.title: Quick Team Builder
qp.subtitle: Mark enemies, your heroes, and roles — the generator will build a lineup considering tiers, synergies, and counter-picks.
qp.empty: Hero list is empty. Please check Google Sheets connection.
qp.total_tooltip: Maximum team size (6) reached. Remove a hero or role to add more.
qp.warning_empty: Select at least one hero or role to generate a team

duo.title: Best Duos
duo.subtitle: The strongest hero duos right now, ranked by synergy grade, hero tiers, and role weight.

trio.title: Best Trios
trio.subtitle: Core duo with strong synergy, enhanced by a third hero that maximizes team weight and flexibility.

quadro.title: Best Quadri
quadro.subtitle: Two powerful duos combined into a 4-hero squad. Each pair has its own synergy grade.

team.title: Best Full Teams
team.subtitle: Complete 6-hero lineups optimized for maximum closed team-ups and strict role composition priorities.
team.no_teams: No valid 6-hero teams found matching the criteria.

teamups.title: Hero Team-Ups
teamups.subtitle: Select a hero to discover their best synergies and team-up potential with other characters.
teamups.no_desc: Description not available yet. Check back later for updates!
teamups.no_synergies_yet: This hero might not have recorded synergies yet.
